text: The transition from a dim, empty corridor into this colorful, idea-filled space makes me feel a subtle shift from isolation to possibility. The first image gives me a hush of anticipation, an awareness of unseen presence and latent potential. In the second, I am immersed in an environment of inquiry and creativity—walls invite innovation, and the text speaks directly to my own sense of wonder. This juxtaposition heightens my curiosity and readies my mind for reflection and exploration. I feel both small and expanded, slightly off-balance but eager to engage.
